title: JukeboxSpeaker
description: Craft Music discs, connect Jukeboxes & NoteBlocks to Speakers.
body:
New Blocks -
- Record Press - Process Resin Clumps into Blank Records.
- Record Lathe - Craft records (Vanilla Records only)
- Jukeblock - Holds up to 18 records to shuffle from.
- Speaker Block (w/ Wall and Ceiling variants) - Extends the range of Noteblocks, Jukebox, and Jukeblock.

New Items -
- Resin Clump
- Record Press
- Record Lathe
- Tuning Tool - Used to connect the Noteblocks, Jukebox, and Jukeblock to Speakers.

This mod requires ffmpeg and yt-dlp for YouTube audio processing. These tools are only needed on the server (not clients in multiplayer), if in a Single Player, they will download to the client.

During Mod Initialization(and custom records are enabled via Configs), betterdiscs will automatically download or if needed, update these open-source tools from their official GitHub releases:

- yt-dlp: https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp

- ffmpeg: https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds (Windows/Mac)

If you're choosing to download manually, and it starts to fail when trying to create a new record, BE SURE yt-dlp is updated to the latest version!

Linux users: It's recommended to install ffmpeg via your package manager (apt install ffmpeg, dnf install ffmpeg, etc.) instead of the auto-download.

Copyright & Legal Disclaimer

This mod provides tools to download audio from YouTube URLs. You are responsible for ensuring you have the right to use any content you download.

Only download content you own, have permission to use, or that is licensed for your intended use
Respect copyright laws and YouTube's Terms of Service
This mod is a tool - I am not responsible for how users choose to use it
Downloading copyrighted music without permission may violate copyright laws in your jurisdiction

**Use this feature responsibly and legally.**
